Bus Timings

Detailed Guide to Al Barsha (3) Street 31B A 1 Bus Stop in Dubai

January 11, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The Al Barsha (3), Street 31B A 1 Bus Stop is a key transit point located in the vibrant Al Barsha area of Dubai. This bus stop plays a crucial role in the daily commutes of both residents and visitors, offering convenient access to nearby amenities, shopping centers, dining options, and healthcare facilities. Its strategic location makes it an essential part of Dubai’s public transportation network, providing easy connections to various destinations across the city.

Address

Al Barsha (3) Street 31B A 1, Dubai United Arab Emirates

Map

View Google directions here.

The bus stop is situated in a bustling neighborhood, well-connected to major roads and facilities. Its integration with local bus routes ensures smooth transit across different parts of Dubai. Additionally, the proximity to key amenities like shopping centers and healthcare facilities enhances its convenience for both residents and visitors. The area is vibrant and well-frequented, making the bus stop a central point for accessing various essential services.

Bus Routes and Timings

The following bus routes service the Al Barsha (3), Street 31B A 1 Bus Stop, with regular intervals throughout the day:

Bus Route Bus Station Timings
F33 Al Barsha 3 10:53 AM
F33 Al Barsha 3 11:23 AM
F33 Al Barsha 3 11:53 AM
F33 Al Barsha 3 12:53 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 1:57 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 3:01 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 4:00 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 4:53 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 5:28 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 5:58 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 6:28 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 6:58 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 7:25 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 7:55 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 8:22 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 8:52 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 9:22 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 9:52 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 10:22 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 11:02 PM
F33 Al Barsha 3 12:05 AM
F33 Al Barsha 3 5:43 AM
F33 Al Barsha 3 6:36 AM
F33 Al Barsha 3 7:31 AM
F33 Al Barsha 3 8:15 AM

Bus Route Details

The Al Barsha (3), Street 31B A 1 Bus Stop is primarily served by the F33 route, offering reliable transportation throughout the day.

  • F33 Route: The F33 route connects various points within Al Barsha. Buses on this route start operating early in the morning, with the first departure at 05:43 AM, and continue running at frequent intervals throughout the day. The last bus departs at 12:05 AM. This route provides essential connectivity within the Al Barsha area, catering to both residential and commercial needs.

Nearby Destinations

The bus stop’s location makes it an ideal starting point for accessing local amenities, shopping centers, and dining options. Notable nearby destinations include:

Restaurants

  • Gourmet Grove Dubai: Known for its gourmet cuisine and relaxed ambiance.
  • Al Hadaq Seafood Restaurant: Specializes in fresh seafood dishes.
  • Baalbak Restaurant: Renowned for its Middle Eastern delicacies.

Landmarks

  • Federal Authority For Identity and Citizenship: A significant government facility for identity services.
Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE
  • Moosa Maroof: A local landmark in Al Barsha.
  • Leader Villa Al Barsha 3: A well-known residential complex in the area.
  • Khalid’s House: A notable residential location in the vicinity.
  • Al Barsha Guest House: Provides accommodation for visitors.

Shopping Centers

  • Galleria Mall Al Barsha: A popular mall offering a range of retail options.

  • Torino Shopping Mall: Features various stores and dining options.
  • New Showroom Shopping Mall: A local shopping destination with diverse stores.
  • Vape Harbour Dubai Shopping Mall: Specializes in vaping products and accessories.
  • Union Coop Al Barsha Hypermarket: A major hypermarket for groceries and essentials.

Healthcare Facilities

  • Al Barsha Health Centre: Provides general medical services and specialist care.

  • IMC Medical Centre: Offers a range of healthcare services and consultations.
  • American Hospital Clinic: Known for its comprehensive medical services.
  • Saudi German Hospital Dubai: A major hospital offering various medical treatments.

Pharmacies

  • Medicina Pharmacy Hessa, Al Barsha Dubai: A well-stocked pharmacy for all healthcare needs.

  • Boots Pharmacy: Offers a wide range of pharmaceutical products.
  • Yasmeen Pharmacy: Known for its personalized service and product selection.
  • Health First Pharmacy: Provides medications and health-related products.

Nearby Stops

  1. Al Barsha 3, Bin Lahej Masjid 1, Street 32b(271m): F33

  2. Al Barsha 3, Street 329 B-1(511m): F33

  3. Al Barsha 3, Street 329 B-2(528m): F33

  4. Al Barsha 3, Al Hawa Street B(563m): F33

  5. Al Barsha 3, Al Asayel St 1 1(573m): F33

The Al Barsha (3), Street 31B A 1 Bus Stop is a vital component of Dubai’s public transportation network, strategically located to provide convenient access to a range of amenities and services.

Whether you’re heading to work, shopping, or simply exploring the neighborhood, this bus stop offers a reliable and accessible point of transit within Dubai.
